source: OCHA, IPC, Gisha, CBC Visual Investigation, Forensic Architecture

territorial_shrinkage.summary: Palestinians are concentrated on less than half of Gaza's land. IDF controls ~60% of territory as of mid-2026, with plans to expand to 70%.
territorial_shrinkage.idf_controlled_source: CBC News visual investigation / IDF confirmation, July 2026
territorial_shrinkage.population_concentration_note: 2.1M Palestinians concentrated on <50% of territory per Forensic Architecture / OCHA

buffer_zones.name: Eastern Perimeter Buffer Zone
buffer_zones.note: Original planned buffer; subsequently expanded well beyond 1km in many areas

buffer_zones.name: Netzarim Corridor
buffer_zones.note: Divides northern and southern Gaza; expanded since ceasefire

buffer_zones.name: Philadelphi Corridor / Southern Buffer
buffer_zones.note: Southern border zone along Egypt frontier

yellow_line.description: Demarcation of IDF-controlled areas marked by concrete blocks; shifted significantly since Oct 2025 ceasefire
yellow_line.kill_zone_allegations: Documented by Forensic Architecture and CBC investigation
